sub_modules.highpass_fir_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM containing the exact 101 signed Q15 high-pass FIR coefficients.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate datapath using the current input sample and the 100 stored prior samples.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_normalize: Combinational fixed-point normalizer that arithmetic right-shifts the signed 64-bit accumulator by 15 bits.
